title: D.R. Horton: Building Scale And Profits
text: Despite its large outperformance, this stock could be worth $181+/share – another 100%+ upside.

title: These 3 Homebuilders Fit the Value Stock Profile
text: Each one of these three residential construction stocks fit the traditional value stock profile: low price-earnings ratios, not too far from book value, decent earnings records, low debt profiles and paying dividends. These are the sorts of valuation metrics Benjamin Graham wrote about in his classic works on the subject.

title: Homebuilding Market Flourishing Despite All Odds: 4 Winners
text: The homebuilding market is on solid gound, which is helping stocks like D.R. Horton (DHI), Toll Brothers (TOL), KB Home (KBH) and Lennar Corporation (LEN).

title: Bull of the Day: D.R. Horton, Inc. (DHI)
text: DHI and other homebuilders are set to benefit from the continued housing boom, with the market still well short of current demand. And D.R. Horton is coming off solid Q1 FY22 financial results in early February.

title: All You Need to Know About D.R. Horton (DHI) Rating Upgrade to Strong Buy
text: D.R. Horton (DHI) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: D.R. Horton: 7.1x Earnings For The Largest Homebuilder In The US
text: D.R. Horton is the largest homebuilder in the US, a market that has seen a shortage of housing supply over the last decade. The valuation is very cheap at 7.1x earnings and the company has been buying back stock at a decent rate.

title: D.R. Horton (DHI) Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Shares Rise
text: D.R. Horton (DHI) gains from higher pricing in fiscal first-quarter 2021. Yet, significant disruptions in its supply chain are a concern.

title: D R Horton Q1 Results Beat Estimates, Raises FY22 Revenue Guidance
text: D R Horton Inc  DHI reported first-quarter FY22 sales growth of 18.9% year-over-year to $7.05 billion, beating the consensus of $6.71 billion. Homebuilding revenue rose 17% Y/Y to $6.7 billion.

title: D.R. Horton (DHI) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: D.R. Horton (DHI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 13.21% and 4.43%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: D.R. Horton stock surges after earnings beat and raised outlook, amid 'very robust' housing market
text: Shares of D.R. Horton Inc. DHI, +0.26% shot up 4.0% in premarket trading Wednesday, after the home builder reported fiscal first-quarter earnings and net sales orders that rose above expectations, and lifted its full-year revenue outlook, amid a "very robust" housing market.

title: Homebuilder DR Horton first-quarter profit jumps
text: D.R. Horton Inc posted a 44.2% rise in quarterly profit on Wednesday, benefiting from record-high property prices and lower interest rates on home loans.

title: D.R. Horton, Inc., America's Builder, Reports Fiscal 2022 First Quarter Earnings and Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.225 Per Share
text: ARLINGTON, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $DHI #earnings--D.R. Horton reported that net income for its first fiscal quarter ended December 31, 2021 increased 48% to $3.17 per diluted share.
